creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

I am not totally familiar with Grafana's lifecycle, but from what I can recall, they will only release security fixes for the last major minor release (I could be wrong). Also, Grafana 2 was released in 2015 [1] which is the last time that this port receives an update. We are at Grafana 8 now.

[1]: https://grafana.com/blog/2015/04/20/grafana-2.0-released/
